description: Structured large-scale coverage mode — waves, browse tiers, shard budgets, and graduation rules.

browseTiers.squad: Default browse import — search and club squads
browseTiers.national-pool: National membership browse pool — not official WC roster

leagueWaves.notes: 20/18 clubs with min 18 players per club

nationalWaves.notes: Final WC 2026 draw nations without live pools — browse-only import + registry membership

shardStrategy.notes: Shards duplicate league payloads for route-level lazy load; gzip relief at 6k–8k requires excluding deferred leagues from sampleData core (phase 11).

externalClubGraduation.policy: Graduate high-traffic TM stubs to proper league clubs only in dedicated waves — never mass-convert 171 stubs in one merge.

projections.sixToEightKRequires: sampleData core split + external league shard + search index partition
